entries.source: "Help me outline a story"
entries.value: "Cabhraigh liom imlíne scéil a dhéanamh"

entries.source: "Improve my essay introduction"
entries.value: "Feabhsaigh réamhrá mo aiste"

entries.source: "Make this paragraph clearer"
entries.value: "Déan an mhír seo níos soiléire"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Writing Coach on inspir for communication learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Treoir phraiticiúil ar Writing Coach a úsáid ar inspir le haghaidh foghlaim chumarsáide, le prasaí, lúba staidéir, agus nósanna IS níos sábháilte.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Lúb staidéir níos láidre

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Teagascóir IS

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays And Drafts: practical guide
entries.value: Cóitseálaí Scríbhneoireachta IS d’Aistí agus Dréachtaí: treoir phraiticiúil

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Cóitseálaí Scríbhneoireachta IS d’Aistí, Scéalta, agus Dréachtaí Níos Soiléire chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: feabhsaigh aistí, scéalta, ríomhphoist, agus argóintí le haiseolas spriocdhírithe a choinníonn do ghuth slán.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Iarr céad chéim bheag seachas freagra deiridh.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS do réasúnaíocht a sheiceáil, ní an toradh amháin.

entries.source: Clarify your point.
entries.value: Soiléirigh do phointe.

entries.source: Communication
entries.value: Cumarsáid

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Críochnaigh trí an smaoineamh a scríobh ar ais ó chuimhne.

entries.source: Improve structure.
entries.value: Feabhsaigh struchtúr.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, stories, emails, scholarship notes, or arguments.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag scríobh aistí, scéalta, ríomhphoist, nótaí scoláireachta nó argóintí.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prasaí le triail

entries.source: Revise with a reason.
entries.value: Athbhreithnigh le cúis.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Writing Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Reading Companion. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Tosaigh an mód beo ag Writing Coach. Más mian leat formáid foghlama chomharsanachta, bain triail as Reading Companion. Le haghaidh léargas níos leithne ar an ardán, léigh cad ba chóir do chompánach foghlama IS a dhéanamh do chách.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Inis don mhód cad atá tú ag iarraidh a fhoghlaim nó a tháirgeadh.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Taispeánann an difríocht sin í féin sa sreabhadh. In ionad freagra ollmhór amháin, bogann na seisiúin is fearr trí lúb: socraigh sprioc, bain triail as rud éigin, faigh aiseolas, deisigh an pointe lag, agus roghnaigh an chéad ghníomh eile.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Tá an fócas sin tábhachtach. Is féidir le chatbot ginearálta beagnach aon rud a fhreagairt, ach tugann mód foghlama cruth don chomhrá. Spreagann sé thú i dtreo an chineáil smaointeoireachta, cleachtaidh, aiseolais, nó fiosraithe a chabhraíonn leis an smaoineamh fanacht.

entries.source: The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: Tugann an cóitseálaí tosaíochtaí leasaithe dírithe agus samplaí roimh agus ina dhiaidh gan do ghuth a chur ina áit.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Is é seo an nós céanna taobh thiar de staidéar le IS gan caimiléireacht a dhéanamh ort féin: coinnigh an foghlaimeoir gníomhach. Is úsáidí IS nuair a thugann sí aiseolas ar do smaointeoireacht.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Tá an mód seo thar a bheith úsáideach d’fhoghlaimeoirí ar mian leo:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Bain triail as an gcéim i d’fhocail féin.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Writing Coach nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Cad leis a gcabhraíonn an mód seo

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Cá háit le dul ina dhiaidh sin

entries.source: Writing Coach
entries.value: Cóitseálaí Scríbhneoireachta

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Is féidir leat tosú freisin le leagan garbh de d’fhadhb fhíor. Tá céad phras míshlachtmhar ceart go leor. Is féidir leis an seisiún an leibhéal, an lucht féachana, an spriocdháta, agus an stíl a shoiléiriú nuair a thosaíonn tú.
